rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 1, DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTORS SALES, U.S.A, INC.'S MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Based On Forum Non-Conveniens Grounds is granted. No opposition filed. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: EICON INC VS WORLDPOINT INTERACTIVE INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dissmiss For Failure To Serve Within Two Years Of Commencement Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 2, CROSS-DEFENDANT MASSIMO FUCHS Motion To Dissmiss For Failure To Serve Within Two Years Of Commencement Of Action IS DENIED. ON JUNE 1, 2008 THE COURT OF APPEAL DETERMINED THAT FUCHS WAIVED ANY ISSUE OF SERVICE BY MAKING A GENERAL APPEARANCE. THE COURT OF APPEAL ALSO FOUND THAT CCP SECTION 583.210 TOLLED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 583.240 FOR ALL BUT 67 DAYS. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS UNDER CCP SECTION 128.5 IS DENIED FOR IT IS NOT APPLICABLE TO CASES FILED AFTER 12/31/94. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY JOHNSON et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 5, DEFENDANT TRINIDAD CORPORATION'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. THE MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. THE DOE AMENDMENT WAS FILED WITHOUT LEAVE OF COURT AND PLAINTIFF KNEW OF DEFENDANT'S EXISTENCE WHEN THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR CHANGING TRINIDAD BUILDERS SUPPLY TO TRINIDAD CORPORATION REQUIRES A HEARING. THE DECISION IN CUADROS V. SUPERIOR COURT (1992) 6 CAL.APP.4TH 671 IS TO BE ADDRESSED BY THE PARTIES. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: FOREST PLAZA LEASING PARTNERS, A CALIFORNIA et al VS. ALBERT RAINER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 16, DEFENDANT ALBERT RAINER, RA LIMITED A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS WERE NOT PARTIES TO THE AGREEMENTS PROVIDING FOR THE AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES. SESSIONS PAYROLL MANAGEMENT INC. V. NOBLE CONSTRUCTION CO., INC. (2000) 84 CAL.APP.4TH 671. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN CARICCHIO VS. GENEREX BIOTECHNOLOGY CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Carmen Caricchio Demurrer To Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 17, Cross-Defendant Carmen Caricchio Demurrer To Cross-Complaint IS OVERRULED. THE FACTS PRESENTED DO NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT GENEREX HAS ENGAGED IN INTRASTATE BUSINESS AS CONSTRASTED WITH CONTACTS SUFFICIENT TO EXERCISE JURISDICTION OVER A PARTY. SPORADIC AND TRANSIENT SALES ACTIVITIES ARE NOT SUFFICIENT. LEVECKE V. GRIESEDIECK WESTERN BREWING CO. (9TH CIR. 1956) 233 F. 2ND 772, 776. SEE ALSO WEST PUBLISHING CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1942) 20 C. 2ND 720, 727-28; MARTIN BROS. ELEC. CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1953) 121 CAL.APP.2D 790. =(302/PJM/ER)

rulings.Case Title: JAY SHUMAN VS. LEVI STRAUSS & CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 10. PLAINTIFF JAY SHUMAN'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar at the request of the moving party. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, A VS. HEALTH PLAN OF SAN JOAQUIN, A PUBLICLY SPONSORED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, November 20, 2008, line 11, DEFENDANT HEALTH PLAN OF SAN JOAQUIN'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO ASCERTAIN WITH CERTAINTY THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET THE SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE TEST BY EXAMINING THE RECORDS PRESENTED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: DON L WHITNEY VS. YMCA SF NMTC, INC.

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MCQUISTON VS. ALICIA GAMEZ et al
